'''''Lucky Day''''' was a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] captured by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Following information from [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] to the [[Galactic Electronics]] Corporation [[XQ2 Platform]] ''[[Pondut]]'', Imperial forces stripped the [[Space station/Legends|facility]] of all technology, to include the [[Mag-pulse warhead/Legends|Mag-pulse Torpedo]]. Imperial [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] inspected [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] [[Transport/Legends|Transport]] ''Lucky Day'' as it fled the research facility carrying an arms dealer. [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|Assault Transports]] [[Omega (ATR-6)|''Omega'']] subsequently captured ''Lucky Day'' as part of the assault.
